Quantize if needed to fit under 150MB.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cat > /app/train.py << 'PYEOF'
import pandas as pd
import fasttext
import os
import re

def clean_text(text):
    text = str(text).lower()
    text = text.replace('\n', ' ').replace('\r', ' ')
    text = re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9\s]', ' ', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

print('Loading data...')
train_df = pd.read_parquet('data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet')
test_df = pd.read_parquet('data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet')

print('Writing train.txt...')
with open('/app/train.txt', 'w') as f:
    for _, row in train_df.iterrows():
        f.write(f'__label__{row["label"]} {clean_text(row["text"])}\n')

print('Writing test.txt...')
with open('/app/test.txt', 'w') as f:
    for _, row in test_df.iterrows():
        f.write(f'__label__{row["label"]} {clean_text(row["text"])}\n')

print('Training model...')
model = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/app/train.txt',
    lr=1.0,
    epoch=50,
    wordNgrams=2,
    dim=100,
    loss='softmax',
    bucket=2000000,
    minCount=1,
    thread=4,
    verbose=2
)

print('\nEvaluating...')
n, p, r = model.test('/app/test.txt')
print(f'Accuracy: {p:.4f}')

model.save_model('/app/model_unquant.bin')
size_mb = os.path.getsize('/app/model_unquant.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Unquantized size: {size_mb:.1f} MB')

print('Quantizing...')
model.quantize(input='/app/train.txt', retrain=True, epoch=10, lr=0.5, thread=4, dsub=2, qnorm=True)
model.save_model('/app/model.bin')
size_mb = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Quantized size: {size_mb:.1f} MB')

n, p, r = model.test('/app/test.txt')
print(f'Quantized accuracy: {p:.4f}')

print('Done!')
PYEOF
